submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-11-expr-group-ref
on: workflow_dispatch
concurrency:
  group: ref-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: marker
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=11-expr-group-ref"
          echo "REF=refs/heads/main"
          sleep 3
          echo "DONE=11"
